title: lithospermum confundum
intro: Lithospermum confundum, also known as Gromwell, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Lithospermum confundum is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
